strategy: Prioritize high-intent pool-runner and tournament-week long tails over generic low-volume category terms like 'pro golf pool'.

primary_targets.intent: Someone wants a tool, not just a definition.

queries: how to run a golf pool
how to run a pga golf pool
primary_targets.intent: Pool host needs setup/scoring help; good CTA to create a pool.
Entrant/host is actively making picks that week.
Adjacent pool formats; use carefully so copy does not promise unsupported formats.

notes: Generic head terms can be monitored, but content should be built around host problems and tournament-week pick guides.
Every guide should include tournament name + pool picks + golf pool strategy language naturally, not keyword stuffing.
The first meaningful win is impressions for tournament-week queries after guide publication, then clicks, then signup/pool creation.
